$comment: c78 (D-CSUBSET-NARROW-SWITCH-DISCRIMINANT-CMP, 2026-07-01): a switch on a sub-int (char/uchar/short) discriminant integer-PROMOTES the controlling expression to int at HIR (C 6.8.4.2), so the dispatch compare runs at >=32-bit width. Pre-fix the narrow discriminant reached MIR->LIR and emitted cmp at width 8/16 -> A_NoMatchingEncodingVariant (no sub-32 integer compare exists on x86 OR arm64 -> a LOWERING fix, not a per-target encoding). The 313x dominant of the post-c77 sqlite encoder frontier. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the switchPrologue promotion -> A_NoMatchingEncodingVariant cmp width 8. => 154.
